defect: non-rated fixture in Class I Div 2
prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a heavy-industrial construction or process site where work follows engineered drawings, specifications, and permits. title: Tool and material selection: Classified-area wiring methods (industrial site)
